title: Faith Is A Fine Invention
content:
Faith is a fine invention
    For gentlemen who see;
    But microscopes are prudent
    In an emergency!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Faith Is A Fine Invention", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
